x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Payment Clearing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing of transactions initiated directly from bank accounts.

Comment:
Examples
SEPA Credit Transfer, Direct Debit, Standing Orders

x-enumeration-literals.name: Card Payment Clearing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing of card-based transactions after authorization and fee calculation.

Comment:
Examples
POS purchases, ATM withdrawals, refunds via Visa/Mastercard

x-enumeration-literals.name: Digital Wallet Clearing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing of transactions made via mobile wallets or payment apps.

Comment:
Examples:
Apple Pay, Google Pay, in-app payments

x-enumeration-literals.name: Real-Time Payment Clearing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing for instant payments where validation occurs immediately.

Comment:
Examples:
SEPA Instant Credit Transfer, Faster Payments Service

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cheque Clearing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing of cheque-based payments, paper or digital.

Comment:
Examples:
Depositing a cheque, image-based cheque clearing

x-enumeration-literals.name: Securities Clearing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing of financial trades before settlement.

Comment:
Examples:
Equity trades, bond trades, repo transactions

x-enumeration-literals.name: Derivatives Clearing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing of derivative contracts with margin and collateral checks.

Comment:
Examples:
Futures, Options, Swaps

x-enumeration-literals.name: FX Clearing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing of currency exchange transactions ensuring both legs are validated.

Comment:
Examples:
Spot FX trades, forward contracts, cross-border payments

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan & Credit Clearing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing of loan disbursements, repayments, and interest settlements.

Comment:
Examples:
Mortgage repayment, personal loan disbursement

x-enumeration-literals.name: Treasury Clearing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing of bank treasury operations for liquidity management.

Comment:
Interbank placements, money market instruments

x-enumeration-literals.name: Collateral Clearing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing of transactions tied to collateral obligations.

Comment:
Examples:
Margin calls, securities lending, collateral transfer

x-enumeration-literals.name: Billing & Invoice Clearing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing of payments arising from bills or invoices.

Comment:
Examples:
Corporate billing settlements, subscription payments

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cross-Border Clearing
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Clearing of transactions between banks across different countries.

Comment:
Examples:
SWIFT payments, remittances, correspondent bank transfers
